title: cuphea varia
intro: Cuphea varia, also known as the small-flowered cuphea or varia cuphea, is a plant species in the Lythraceae family that is native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cuphea varia include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and providing relief from fever, as well as having potential antiviral and antibacterial effects. In herbal preparations, Cuphea varia is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its seeds and leaves are used in various traditional remedies.
